title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.440 - Travel expense to be paid monthly
text:
57.440.  Travel expense to be paid monthly. — Claims for reimbursement for travel shall be submitted to the county commission monthly and paid at the end of the month by warrant drawn on the county treasury by the county commission.
(L. 1945 p. 1547 § 7, L. 1945 p. 1562 § 7, A. 1949 H.B. 2015, A.L. 1957 p. 322, A.L. 1959 S.B. 68)
